name: Bhopali Roti
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon Cumin seeds; dry roasted and ground
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together whole wheat flour, rice flour, and salt into a bowl.
2. Rub 2 tablespoons of ghee or oil into the flour mixture.
3. Add the remaining ingredients except oil (for frying).
4. Gently add water to form a soft dough. Knead well until no longer sticky.
5. Shape the dough into 8 small balls.
6. On a floured surface, roll out each ball into a 6-inch (15 cm) round.
7. Heat a griddle and place the rolled-out dough on it.
8. Dry roast the roti until small brown spots appear on the underside.
9. Turn the roti over and smear a little ghee or oil over the surface.
10. Drizzle 1 teaspoon of ghee or oil around the roti.
11. Cook until both sides are golden brown.
12. Repeat with the remaining dough.
